theme: Fire reactions in order without starving intermediates
title: Culture Flask Scheduling: Reserve the Catalyst, Don't Chase the Brightest Reaction
strategies: trivial: spend the whole raw-material budget on group 0's direct route only (the checker's own baseline) -> ~0.1

greedy: pick the single group with the best per-firing DIRECT yield-per-raw-material rate and dump the entire budget into it, never building the co-reagent Y or touching the scarce catalyst Z -> beats trivial but misses the combo bonus

strong: reformulate as a 2D unbounded knapsack over (raw-material budget, catalyst budget) with items {Direct_g, Combo_g}, solve by DP, and reconstruct a DAG-valid firing sequence that reserves catalyst + co-reagent stock for the best combo route(s)
invalid: fire a Combo reaction before any precursor exists -> immediate infeasibility -> 0
